text: Bitcoin and Ethereum are both down roughly 3% over the past day, signaling mild selling pressure across the major assets despite moderate trading volume at $88B. The Fear & Greed Index sits at 15 (Extreme Fear) and has risen 3 points over the week, suggesting panic has peaked but sentiment remains deeply pessimistic. Bitcoin's dominance at 56.1% indicates capital is rotating away from altcoins toward the largest asset, a typical defensive move during downturns.
